customers.description: This table has basic information about a customer, as well as some derived facts based on a customer's orders

column_descriptions.customer_id: This is a unique identifier for a customer
column_descriptions.first_order: Date (UTC) of a customer's first order
column_descriptions.most_recent_order: Date (UTC) of a customer's most recent order
column_descriptions.number_of_orders: Count of the number of orders a customer has placed
column_descriptions.total_order_amount: Total value (AUD) of a customer's orders

orders.description: This table has basic information about orders, as well as some derived facts based on payments

column_descriptions.order_id: This is a unique identifier for an order
column_descriptions.customer_id: Foreign key to the customers table
column_descriptions.order_date: Date (UTC) that the order was placed
column_descriptions.status:
Orders can be one of the following statuses:

| status         | description                                                                                                            |
|----------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| placed         | The order has been placed but has not yet left the warehouse                                                           |
| shipped        | The order has ben shipped to the customer and is currently in transit                                                  |
| completed      | The order has been received by the customer                                                                            |
| return_pending | The customer has indicated that they would like to return the order, but it has not yet been received at the warehouse |
| returned       | The order has been returned by the customer and received at the warehouse                                              |
column_descriptions.credit_card_amount: Amount of the order (AUD) paid for by credit card
column_descriptions.coupon_amount: Amount of the order (AUD) paid for by coupon
column_descriptions.bank_transfer_amount: Amount of the order (AUD) paid for by bank transfer
column_descriptions.gift_card_amount: Amount of the order (AUD) paid for by gift card
